_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: Targets are calculated as fleet-wide averages per manufacturer across vehicle sub-groups, weighted by mission profile weights, annual mileage values, and payload/passenger values. Average specific CO₂ emissions are expressed in gCO₂/tkm for categories N and O, and gCO₂/pkm for category M.
prior.source_span: For each manufacturer, the following average specific CO 2 emissions shall be calculated: 2.7.1. For the reporting periods of the years 2019 to 2029: CO2(2025) = ZLEV × ∑ sg share sg × MPW sg × avgCO2 sg
